name: Sharjah University Cycling Trail - Wikiloc
snippet: one loop is 4.38 kms...you have to keep repeating it gain kms...but yes...calm n quite n lush green... Missing: length | Show results with: length

name: Cycling Track UAE - Ride & Recharge at Masaar Track, Sharjah
snippet: Explore Masaar Track, a 6.6 km cycling track in Sharjah, UAE, perfect for cyclists of all levels with 24/7 access, lighting, underpasses, and a bridge. Missing: University details

name: Safe Places to Ride – Page 7 - Wolfi's Bike Shop
snippet: No matter where you train, beware of cars, and ride in a safe and predictable manner. Please keep in mind that riding safely is everyone's responsibility.
